who: logistics managers in freight brokerage firms processing 10-20 shipments/month
offer: For logistics managers in freight brokerage firms processing 10-20 shipments/month, inefficient tracking of vehicle maintenance causes unexpected breakdowns. We provide a fleet management system instead of manual tracking spreadsheets.
problem: Inefficient tracking of vehicle maintenance leads to unexpected breakdowns.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for logistics managers
Indie Hackers posts about similar workflows
DM outreach to logistics managers with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools and solutions
try_it: Let users try vehicle tracking and maintenance scheduling on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video of manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
